notes.min_score: 0-100. Higher = fewer but stronger alerts. 50 is balanced, 70 is high-conviction only.
notes.min_fdv: Minimum market cap in USD. Default 30000. Filters out dust/micro tokens.
notes.max_fdv: Maximum market cap in USD. Default 600000. Sweet spot is $100K-$200K — anything above $600K has likely already started running.
notes.discord_webhook_url: Create a webhook: Discord channel → Settings → Integrations → Create Webhook → Copy URL
notes.smart_money_wallets: Add real wallet addresses under each label. Find Gem Finder / Lore Bot wallets by looking up their Telegram/Discord → check recent calls → find the buying wallet on Solscan. Each label can have multiple addresses.
